start_urls_note: Archive page lists all volumes (49+) via <details> blocks with wp-block-button links to individual issue pages. Issue pages carry direct PDF links. Use depth>=2 to reach issue pages from archive.

metadata.journal_name: Harvard Journal of Law & Public Policy

navigation.volume_url_pattern: /volume-{N}/ for vols 13–46; /volume-{N}-issue-{word}/ for vols 39–49 (e.g. /volume-47-issue-one/, /volume-48-issue-two/); /volume-49-2/ for vol 49 issue 1
navigation.archive_path: archive/ -> a.wp-block-button__link (issue pages) -> a[href$='.pdf'] (direct PDF links on issue page)
navigation.notes: Original domain harvard-jlpp.com is dead (404); canonical URL is journals.law.harvard.edu/jlpp/. PDFs served from /wp-content/uploads/sites/90/. Two layout formats: (1) vols 47+: h3.wp-block-heading>a[href$='.pdf'] + p>strong>em for author; (2) vols 13-46: figure.wp-block-table table td a[href$='.pdf'] with author in last td. Both formats link PDFs directly on issue pages. Jetpack sitemap at /sitemap-1.xml lists 277 URLs including all volume/issue pages and some individual article pages. Smoke soft-fail: IssueArchiveEnumeratorAdapter downloaded 507 KB PDF successfully but extracted title as 'READ HERE' (homepage featured-article button text) rather than the article title from the issue page; author/volume/year not captured. Full metadata requires a site-specific adapter or selector-driven extraction from issue pages.

selectors.comment: Two formats: recent vols use h3 headings per article; older vols use table rows. Both contain direct PDF links.
Title is the link text of the PDF anchor.
Recent vols: author in p>strong>em following the h3. Older vols: author in last td of the table row, wrapped in <em>.
PDFs are in /wp-content/uploads/sites/90/. Pattern: {vol}.{AuthorName}.pdf for recent; {vol}_{iss}_{n}-{AuthorName}-Final.pdf for older vols.
